sections.name: Title
sections.guidance: Short noun phrase. Example: 'Use PostgreSQL for persistence'

sections.name: Status
sections.guidance: New ADRs start as Proposed. Set Accepted after team review.

sections.name: Context
sections.guidance: Describe the forces at play: technical constraints, business requirements, team capabilities. Be factual, not prescriptive.

sections.name: Decision
sections.guidance: State the decision in active voice: 'We will use X because Y.' Include alternatives considered briefly.

sections.name: Consequences
sections.guidance: List concrete, measurable consequences. Each item should be independently verifiable.

optional_sections.name: Deciders
optional_sections.guidance: List people involved in the decision.

optional_sections.name: Options Considered
optional_sections.guidance: Enumerate alternatives with pros/cons for each.

optional_sections.name: Links
optional_sections.guidance: Related ADRs, issues, or external references.
